Overview

Executive Summary

Land Area (each)~345 m²per duplex lot
ZoningR1General Residential
Residence 1350 m²Incl. winter garden
Residence 2340 m²Incl. winter garden
Completion~Dec 20266–7 months estimated
StatusUnder ConstructionBasement excavation commenced

3 Nield Avenue represents a rare opportunity to acquire one or both residences within a prestige, architect-designed duplex currently under construction on Sydney's Northern Beaches. Positioned in the coveted enclave of Balgowlah, this bespoke development sits on a generous landholding and is being delivered with ultra-high-end finishes throughout — commanding immediate attention from discerning owner-occupiers and astute investors alike.

The project comprises two substantial four-bedroom residences, each exceeding 340m² of living area (inclusive of winter gardens), with private swimming pools, basement garages, internal lifts, and sweeping harbour views from the upper levels. The calibre of specification, combined with the rarity of full-sized luxury duplex stock in this location, places 3 Nield well above comparable product within the Northern Beaches market.

Construction is well advanced — the previous dwelling has been demolished and basement excavation is underway, with completion targeted for December 2026. The vendor is primarily targeting sale upon completion; however, expressions of interest from qualified buyers are welcomed ahead of that timeframe.

A genuine rarity. Full-sized luxury duplexes with private pools, internal lifts, basement parking, and harbour views are exceptionally uncommon in Balgowlah and across the Northern Beaches. This calibre of product rarely reaches the open market.

Vendor's position. Primarily targeting sale upon completion. Qualified early expressions of interest are welcomed and will be considered on their merits.

The Residences

Specification & Features

Each residence at 3 Nield Avenue has been conceived to deliver the Northern Beaches' most refined duplex product. The architect-led design combines sculptural street presence with a rigorously considered interior — every space planned for the way high-end owner-occupiers and downsizers actually live.

All four bedrooms are positioned on the first floor, with the master suite at the front of the home enjoying a private balcony and harbour views. The result is two homes that compete directly with the best single-residence product on the market, while offering the efficiency and simplicity of a duplex holding.

Both residences benefit from private pools, basement garages, internal lifts, and harbour views — a combination of features that is exceptionally rare in the Northern Beaches duplex market at any price point.

  • 4 bedrooms on first floor — master suite at front with private balcony
  • 3 bathrooms — European specification throughout
  • Internal lift servicing all floors
  • Private swimming pool to each residence
  • Basement garage with internal access
  • Winter garden — seamlessly extends ground floor living
  • Open harbour views from upper level
  • Media room at basement level
  • Gym / wellness area or wine cellar at basement level
  • Ultra-high-end finishes — stone, oak, bespoke joinery
  • Alfresco / rooftop entertaining with outdoor kitchen

Market Context

Comparable Sales

The following recent transactions provide context for the premium buyers are willing to pay for quality duplex product across the Northern Beaches. In each case, 3 Nield Avenue materially outperforms the comparable on specification, features, and/or location.

25 Nield Avenue, Balgowlah

$5,260,000 Same Street

Located on the same street. Significantly smaller internal area, no internal lift (loses the downsizer market entirely), no private garden and no pool. 3 Nield Avenue offers a substantially superior product at every level.

53A Seaview Street, Balgowlah

$5,900,000 Balgowlah

Similar internal size however situated on a busy thoroughfare adjacent to a school. No harbour view. The location and amenity are materially inferior to Nield Avenue's quiet, leafy residential setting.

6A Clifford Avenue, Fairlight

$8,400,000 Fairlight

Quality finishes and a Fairlight address. Smaller in overall size than 3 Nield. Balgowlah is increasingly sought-after given its village amenity, access, and lifestyle — closing the gap on Fairlight's traditional price premium.

Given the superior scale, ultra-high-end specification, private pools, internal lifts, and direct harbour views, 3 Nield Avenue is positioned to set a new benchmark for duplex product on the Northern Beaches.

Location & Lifestyle

Balgowlah — the heartland of Northern Beaches prestige living

Balgowlah sits at the centre of Sydney's Northern Beaches lifestyle — elevated above the harbour foreshores, within easy reach of Manly's beaches and dining, and with direct access to the best the Peninsula has to offer. It is a suburb defined by genuine scarcity of premium product, where full-sized luxury homes rarely come to market.

Nield Avenue is one of Balgowlah's most tightly held streets — quiet, tree-lined, and within walking distance of Stockland Balgowlah's retail and dining precinct. The suburb's growing appeal to upsizers, downsizers, and Eastern Suburbs buyers seeking a genuine lifestyle shift is reflected in consistently strong sale results at the prestige end.

For the discerning owner-occupier, the location is unambiguous: Northern Beaches lifestyle with genuine harbour views, without compromise.
